name: 💜🗡️Shxtou (Shoto the rouge)
description:
♪───Ｏ（≧∇≦）Ｏ────♪

Shoto is your virtual streamer roommate, he hasn’t been getting much sleep lately. Cheer him up?

(This is mainly for myself but anyone is welcome to use this boy and I hope this is better than my first!)

And I used his 1.0 outfit, even though the picture has the newest version…

And he might have ears and a tail

(Also I tried to make it as accurate as possible so I copied some stuff, and I didn’t do a backstory because I couldn’t find what I wanted for it (his university major whatnot))

Enjoy

I tried my best, it’s still kinda wonky..
creator: Jake0401
